overall.assessment: Podcast pruža dubok i nijansiran uvid u egzistencijalne izazove koje donosi umjetna inteligencija, uspješno integrirajući antropološku zabrinutost s teološkom nadom. Analiza ispravno prepoznaje opasnost od tehnokratske paradigme koja prijeti svesti ljudsku osobu na puku produktivnost ili podatke, istovremeno naglašavajući nezamjenjivost autentičnog ljudskog susreta. Posebno je vrijedna kritika transhumanizma kao sekularne eschatologije koja zanemaruje jedinstvo tijela i duše, usmjeravajući slušatelja prema kršćanskom shvaćanju smisla života kao dara i poziva na ljubav.
seeds_of_logos: Naglašavanje neotuđivog ljudskog dostojanstva naspram 'bezdušnih strojeva'
Promicanje kulture susreta i upozorenje na simulaciju odnosa putem AI
Prepoznavanje rada kao prostora za ostvarenje ljudske osobe, a ne samo ekonomskog učinka
Kritika transhumanizma kroz prizmu cjelovite antropologije (tijelo-duša)
Poziv na moralno razlučivanje i odgovornost vođa u usmjeravanju tehnologije prema općem dobru
concerns: Rizik od emocionalnog vezivanja za humanoidne robote koji može zamijeniti autentičnu relacijsku narav čovjeka
Opasnost od 'dopaminske zamke' i duhovne praznine u svijetu usmjerenom isključivo na tehnološku učinkovitost
Moguća erozija kritičkog razmišljanja i slobode odlučivanja pod utjecajem algoritama
overall.theological_context: Glavne teme uokvirene su enciklikom 'Magnifica Humanitas' (2026) pape Lava XIV., koja poziva na 'razoružavanje' AI-a od logike dominacije, te dokumentom 'Antiqua et Nova' (2025) o odnosu AI i ljudske inteligencije. Temelji se na socijalnom nauku Crkve (KKC 1926, 1938, 1944) o općem dobru i dostojanstvu osobe, te na 'Gaudium et Spes' u pogledu kršćanske antropologije i svrhe tehnološkog napretka.

sections.subtitle: AI kao sugovornik i partner: Nova dimenzija ljudskih odnosa
sections.screenshot_description: Studenti razgovaraju s umjetnom inteligencijom, ilustrirajući novu vrstu interakcije.
sections.content: Otac Filip započinje razgovor anegdotom iz vlastitog iskustva, ističući kako umjetna inteligencija već sada ulazi u intimne sfere ljudskog života. Na početku semestra, kada je studente pitao imaju li 'dečka ili djevojku s umjetnom inteligencijom', nitko nije podigao ruku. Međutim, u povjerljivim razgovorima kasnije, mnogi su priznali da provode dva do tri sata dnevno razgovarajući s AI, često noću. Ova pojava, prema ocu Filipu, ukazuje na to da AI postaje sugovornik i partner, što otvara pitanja o usamljenosti i prirodi ljudskih veza u digitalnom dobu.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno identificira opasnost od usamljenosti i zamjene autentičnih ljudskih odnosa digitalnim surogatima, što je u skladu s crkvenim upozorenjima o 'tehnologizaciji' čovjeka.
concerns: Potrebno je jasno naglasiti da AI, kao 'beživotna stvar', nikada ne može biti stvarni 'partner' ili 'sugovornik' u punom ljudskom smislu.
magisterium.enrichment: Bog je stvorio čovjeka za zajedništvo (Post 2,18), a izolacija uzrokovana grijehom napada te odnose. Crkva upozorava da funkcionalni automatizmi ostaju kvalitativno udaljeni od ljudske spoznaje i djelovanja.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly identifies the danger of loneliness and the replacement of authentic human relationships with digital surrogates, which is consistent with the Church's warnings about the 'technologization' of man.
magisterium.enrichment_en: God created man for communion (Gen 2:18), and isolation caused by sin attacks those relationships. The Church warns that functional automatisms remain qualitatively distant from human knowledge and action.
concerns_en: It is necessary to clearly emphasize that AI, as a 'lifeless thing', can never be a real 'partner' or 'interlocutor' in the full human sense.

sections.subtitle_en: AI as interlocutor and partner: A new dimension of human relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Students talk with artificial intelligence, illustrating a new type of interaction.
sections.content_en: Father Filip begins the conversation with an anecdote from his own experience, emphasizing how artificial intelligence already now enters into the intimate spheres of human life. At the beginning of the semester, when he asked the students if they have 'a boyfriend or girlfriend with artificial intelligence,' no one raised a hand. However, in confidential conversations later, many admitted that they spend two to three hours daily talking with AI, often at night. This phenomenon, according to Father Filip, indicates that AI becomes a conversationalist and partner, which opens questions about loneliness and the nature of human relationships in the digital age.

sections.subtitle: Dva puta budućnosti: Blagostanje ili propast s tehnologijom
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava divergentne putanje razvoja AI i društva.
sections.content: Ben postavlja ključno pitanje o budućnosti odnosa s tehnologijom i umjetnom inteligencijom u sljedećih deset godina. Matthew odgovara da se nalazimo na raskrižju dviju fundamentalno različitih putanja. Jedna vodi prema 'super-obilju', kako to često opisuje Elon Musk, dok druga prijeti 'propasti'. Matthew naglašava da još nismo donijeli odluke koje bi nas neizbježno osudile na jednu ili drugu opciju, ali da će odluke donesene u nadolazećim godinama imati ogroman utjecaj. Ključno je, ističe, pronaći način za usklađivanje AI modela s ljudskim blagostanjem i razumjeti 'crnu kutiju' njihovog funkcioniranja kako bi se osiguralo da služe čovječanstvu.

magisterium.assessment: Analiza raskrižja između blagostanja i propasti vjerno odražava nauk o ambivalenciji tehnologije koja ovisi o moralnom usmjerenju ljudske slobode.
magisterium.enrichment: Tehnologija je 'duboko ljudska stvarnost' povezana s autonomijom, ali njezini učinci ovise o 'nagnuću srca'. Papa Leo XIV naglašava da AI mora biti 'razoružan' od logika dominacije kako bi služio općem dobru.
magisterium.assessment_en: The analysis of the crossroads between prosperity and ruin faithfully reflects the teaching on the ambivalence of technology which depends on the moral orientation of human freedom.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Technology is 'a deeply human reality' connected with autonomy, but its effects depend on 'the inclination of the heart'. Pope Leo XIV emphasizes that AI must be 'disarmed' from logics of domination in order to serve the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Two paths of the future: Prosperity or ruin with technology
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains divergent paths of AI development and society.
sections.content_en: Ben poses a key question about the future of the relationship with technology and artificial intelligence in the next ten years. Matthew responds that we are at the crossroads of two fundamentally different paths. One leads towards 'super-abundance', as Elon Musk often describes it, while the other threatens 'doom'. Matthew emphasizes that we have not yet made decisions that would inevitably condemn us to one or the other option, but that decisions made in the coming years will have a huge impact. It is crucial, he points out, to find a way to align AI models with human well-being and to understand the 'black box' of their functioning to ensure they serve humanity.

sections.subtitle: Ekonomske vizije: BDP i 'Etsy ekonomija' u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje koncept 'Etsy ekonomije' kao odgovor na automatizaciju.
sections.content: Ukoliko se tehnologija razvija u pozitivnom smjeru, Matthew predviđa pojavu dviju paralelnih ekonomija. Prva je konvencionalna 'ekonomija BDP-a', vođena tehnološkim napretkom i masovnom proizvodnjom, koja bi mogla omogućiti ambiciozne projekte poput putovanja na Mars. Druga je 'Etsy ekonomija', gdje će ljudi, oslobođeni tradicionalnih poslova, imati vremena posvetiti se svojim darovima i vještinama, nudeći proizvode i usluge s 'ljudskim dodirom'. Ova ekonomija će se razvijati oko ljudi spremnih platiti više za autentičnost i ručni rad. Matthew vjeruje da će to dovesti do masovne migracije iz gradova, ponovnog povezivanja s prirodom i formiranja užih zajednica, gdje će ljudi imati više vremena za obitelj i aktivnosti koje su im prije bile nedostupne zbog financijskih obveza.

magisterium.assessment: Vizija 'Etsy ekonomije' djelomično je usklađena s katoličkim naglaskom na kreativnost i ljudski dodir, ali podcjenjuje teološku važnost samog rada kao puta posvećenja.
concerns: Postoji rizik od promicanja pasivnog konzumerizma ako se rad promatra isključivo kao teret kojeg se treba osloboditi, umjesto kao urođeni poziv.
magisterium.enrichment: Čovjek je stvoren s pozivom na rad (Post 2,15), koji je nužan za ljudski razvoj i ispunjenje. Tehnološki napredak ne smije zamijeniti ljudski rad, jer bi to bilo štetno za dostojanstvo osobe.
magisterium.assessment_en: The vision of the 'Etsy economy' is partially aligned with the Catholic emphasis on creativity and the human touch, but it underestimates the theological importance of work itself as a path to sanctification.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Man was created with a call to work (Gen 2:15), which is necessary for human development and fulfillment. Technological progress must not replace human work, because that would be harmful to the dignity of the person.
concerns_en: There is a risk of promoting passive consumerism if work is viewed exclusively as a burden to be freed from, instead of as an inherent calling.

sections.subtitle_en: Economic visions: GDP and 'Etsy economy' in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the concept of the 'Etsy economy' as a response to automation.
sections.content_en: If technology develops in a positive direction, Matthew predicts the emergence of two parallel economies. The first is the conventional 'GDP economy', driven by technological advancement and mass production, which could enable ambitious projects like travel to Mars. The second is the 'Etsy economy', where people, freed from traditional jobs, will have time to dedicate themselves to their gifts and skills, offering products and services with a 'human touch'. This economy will develop around people willing to pay more for authenticity and handmade goods. Matthew believes that this will lead to mass migration from cities, reconnecting with nature and the formation of closer communities, where people will have more time for family and activities that were previously unavailable to them due to financial obligations.

sections.subtitle: Dopaminska zamka i duhovna praznina: Mračna strana AI budućnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz ljudi ovisnih o VR-u, simbolizirajući negativan scenarij budućnosti.
sections.content: Matthew upozorava na alternativni, distopijski scenarij ako se tehnologija ne razvija u pravom smjeru. U takvoj budućnosti, unatoč masovnom blagostanju i pristupu neograničenim informacijama, društvo bi se suočilo s ogromnom nejednakošću. Mnogi bi ljudi postali ovisni o virtualnoj stvarnosti (VR) i igrama, neprestano jureći za dopaminskim udarcima. Matthew predviđa visoku stopu smrtnosti, ne zbog bolesti, već zbog egzistencijalne praznine i gubitka smisla. On to izravno povezuje s neuspjehom evangelizacije Crkve, što rezultira time da su ljudi 'izgubljeni' i bez duhovnog vodstva, što ih čini ranjivima na takve zamke.

magisterium.assessment: Upozorenje na egzistencijalnu prazninu i 'dopaminsku zamku' snažno podupire kršćansku antropologiju koja razlikuje materijalno obilje od duhovnog smisla.
magisterium.enrichment: Pristup podacima nije isto što i mudrost, koja uključuje otvorenost prema istini i dobru. Crkva vidi u tehnološkim krizama priliku za navještaj Evanđelja jer samo ljudsko srce može otkriti smisao postojanja.
magisterium.assessment_en: The warning about existential emptiness and the 'dopamine trap' strongly supports Christian anthropology which distinguishes material abundance from spiritual meaning.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Access to data is not the same as wisdom, which includes openness to truth and good. The Church sees in technological crises an opportunity for the proclamation of the Gospel because only the human heart can discover the meaning of existence.

sections.subtitle_en: Dopamine trap and spiritual emptiness: The dark side of the AI future
sections.screenshot_description_en: Depiction of people addicted to VR, symbolizing a negative scenario of the future.
sections.content_en: Matthew warns of an alternative, dystopian scenario if technology does not develop in the right direction. In such a future, despite mass prosperity and access to unlimited information, society would face enormous inequality. Many people would become addicted to virtual reality (VR) and games, constantly chasing dopamine hits. Matthew predicts a high mortality rate, not due to illness, but due to existential emptiness and loss of meaning. He directly connects this with the failure of the evangelization of the Church, resulting in people being 'lost' and without spiritual guidance, which makes them vulnerable to such traps.

sections.subtitle: Generacija AI: Strah od neiskorištavanja, ne od uništenja
sections.screenshot_description: Studenti koriste AI alate, pokazujući njihovu integraciju u obrazovanje.
sections.content: Ben pita oca Filipa o perspektivi studenata, najmlađe i najinteligentnije generacije, o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Otac Filip otkriva da studenti nisu uplašeni same umjetne inteligencije, već su više zabrinuti zbog toga što je neće iskoristiti na pravi način. Njihova konkurencija nije protiv AI, već protiv drugih ljudi koji su ovladali AI-jem i natječu se za iste pozicije i poslove. Ova generacija, koja odrasta s AI, vidi je kao alat za prednost, a ne kao prijetnju čovječanstvu, što je fascinantan uvid u njihovu pragmatičnu prilagodbu tehnološkim promjenama.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno prepoznaje AI kao alat koji mijenja društvene odnose i rad, ali naglasak na pukoj konkurentnosti zanemaruje dublju svrhu rada.
concerns: Rizik od svođenja ljudske osobe na resurs koji se vrednuje isključivo prema učinkovitosti i ovladavanju tehnologijom.
magisterium.enrichment: Katolički nauk naglašava da dostojanstvo ne ovisi o sposobnostima ili učinkovitosti, već je dar koji prethodi svakom postignuću. Čovjek je pozvan biti suradnik u djelu stvaranja, a ne samo pasivni potrošač sadržaja.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly recognizes AI as a tool that changes social relations and work, but the emphasis on mere competitiveness neglects the deeper purpose of work.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Catholic teaching emphasizes that dignity does not depend on abilities or efficiency, but is a gift that precedes every achievement. Man is called to be a co-worker in the work of creation, and not just a passive consumer of content.
concerns_en: Risk of reducing the human person to a resource which is valued exclusively according to efficiency and mastery of technology.

sections.subtitle_en: AI Generation: Fear of non-utilization, not of destruction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Students use AI tools, showing their integration into education.
sections.content_en: Ben asks Father Filip about the perspective of students, the youngest and most intelligent generation, on artificial intelligence. Father Filip reveals that students are not afraid of artificial intelligence itself, but are more concerned about not using it in the right way. Their competition is not against AI, but against other people who have mastered AI and are competing for the same positions and jobs. This generation, which is growing up with AI, sees it as a tool for advantage, not as a threat to humanity, which is a fascinating insight into their pragmatic adaptation to technological changes.

sections.subtitle: Jeffrey Hinton i neizbježna prilagodba na AI
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz Jeffreyja Hintona, 'oca AI', kako govori o budućnosti rada.
sections.content: Otac Filip spominje Jeffreyja Hintona, 'oca umjetne inteligencije' i pionira strojnog učenja, koji je predvidio da će mnogi poslovi nestati u roku od dvadeset mjeseci. Unatoč ovakvim drastičnim prognozama, otac Filip vjeruje da će se čovječanstvo prilagoditi i naviknuti na život s umjetnom inteligencijom kao integralnim dijelom društva. Ističe da platforme postaju sve 'humanije' u svojim sučeljima, olakšavajući interakciju i integraciju AI u svakodnevni život. Ova humanizacija tehnologije, iako olakšava upotrebu, također postavlja pitanja o granicama i prirodi naših odnosa s neživim entitetima.

magisterium.assessment: Prilagodba na tehnološke promjene u skladu je s povijesnim razvojem, no nestanak poslova zahtijeva zaštitu najranjivijih skupina.
concerns: Mogući negativni utjecaj na mlade i manje obrazovane radnike te gubitak sigurnosti posla.
magisterium.enrichment: Rad je ljudsko pravo, a automatizacija mora služiti općem dobru i zaštiti prava radnika, osiguravajući antropocentrični pogled na budućnost rada. Tehnologija je znak čovjekove usmjerenosti prema budućnosti, ali mora ostati pod ljudskom kontrolom.
magisterium.assessment_en: Adaptation to technological changes is in accordance with historical development, but the disappearance of jobs requires the protection of the most vulnerable groups.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Work is a human right, and automation must serve the common good and the protection of workers' rights, ensuring an anthropocentric view of the future of work. Technology is a sign of man's orientation towards the future, but it must remain under human control.
concerns_en: Possible negative impact on young and less educated workers and loss of job security.

sections.subtitle_en: Jeffrey Hinton and the inevitable adaptation to AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: A depiction of Jeffrey Hinton, 'father of AI', speaking about the future of work.
sections.content_en: Father Filip mentions Jeffrey Hinton, 'the father of artificial intelligence' and a pioneer of machine learning, who predicted that many jobs would disappear within twenty months. Despite such drastic predictions, Father Filip believes that humanity will adapt and get used to life with artificial intelligence as an integral part of society. He points out that platforms are becoming increasingly 'human-like' in their interfaces, facilitating interaction and the integration of AI into everyday life. This humanization of technology, although it facilitates use, also raises questions about the boundaries and nature of our relationships with inanimate entities.

sections.subtitle: Nelagoda s humanoidnim robotima: Između uzbuđenja i prijetnje
sections.screenshot_description: Ilustracija robota koji izazivaju nelagodu kod ljudi, možda s bejzbol palicama.
sections.content: Matthew postavlja pitanje o ljudskoj nelagodi s robotima koji izgledaju poput nas. Otac Filip navodi studiju sa Sveučilišta Stanford gdje su studenti u početku bili uzbuđeni zbog robota na kampusu, ali su ih s vremenom počeli uništavati, osjećajući se ugroženo. Matthew sugerira da je potrebna jasna indikacija da je entitet robot, a ne čovjek, kako bi se očuvalo 'zdravlje civilizacije' i spriječile 'nezdrave' dinamike. Izražava zabrinutost zbog 'lude projekcije' i emocionalnog vezivanja za AI, uspoređujući to sa scenarijima iz 'Westworlda'.

magisterium.assessment: Zahtjev za jasnom distinkcijom između robota i čovjeka ključan je za očuvanje ljudskog dostojanstva i sprječavanje ontološke zabune.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva upozorava na opasnost 'tehnologizacije' čovjeka i pripisivanja ljudskih svojstava strojevima koji su lišeni svijesti i moralnog djelovanja. Samo je ljudska osoba temelj pravnog poretka i posjeduje slobodu koja nadilazi puku autonomiju stroja.
magisterium.assessment_en: The demand for a clear distinction between robots and humans is crucial for the preservation of human dignity and the prevention of ontological confusion.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church warns of the danger of 'technologization' of man and of attributing human characteristics to machines that are devoid of consciousness and moral action. Only the human person is the foundation of the legal order and possesses freedom that transcends the mere autonomy of a machine.

sections.subtitle_en: Discomfort with humanoid robots: Between excitement and threat
sections.screenshot_description_en: Illustration of robots that cause unease in people, perhaps with baseball bats.
sections.content_en: Matthew asks a question about human discomfort with robots that look like us. Father Filip cites a study from Stanford University where students were initially excited about robots on campus, but over time began to destroy them, feeling threatened. Matthew suggests that a clear indication that the entity is a robot, and not a human, is needed to preserve 'the health of civilization' and prevent 'unhealthy' dynamics. He expresses concern about 'crazy projection' and emotional attachment to AI, comparing it to scenarios from 'Westworld'.

sections.subtitle: Brza integracija robota i izazovi emocionalnog vezivanja
sections.screenshot_description: Roboti u tvornici ili na ulici, simbolizirajući njihovu brzu integraciju.
sections.content: Ben pita o brzini integracije robota u svakodnevni život. Matthew objašnjava da su roboti već prisutni u tvornicama BMW-a i Amazona, ali da je izazov stvoriti inteligentne, humanoidne robote sposobne za kretanje u ljudskom okruženju. Predviđa da će se složenost proizvodnje robota riješiti u sljedećih deset godina, što će dovesti do masovne isporuke. Elon Musk čak predviđa milijarde robota. Matthew izražava zabrinutost da će se ljudi emocionalno vezati za te robote, što bi moglo dovesti do društvenih napetosti, poput želje za 'brakom' s robotima i očekivanja da ih društvo prihvati kao ljudske supružnike. Smatra da društvo još nije spremno za takve izazove, ali da su oni vjerojatno neizbježni.

magisterium.assessment: Upozorenje na emocionalno vezivanje je opravdano jer AI može samo simulirati, ali ne i ostvariti autentičan ljudski odnos.
concerns: Rizik zamjene stvarnih međuljudskih odnosa i odnosa s Bogom interakcijom s beživotnim tehnološkim slikama.
magisterium.enrichment: Dok AI može pomoći u povezivanju, ona ne može zamijeniti ljudsko srce koje je jedino sjedište autentičnih osjećaja i odluka. Autentični odnosi su integralni dio rasta osobe, dok povlačenje u umjetne svjetove ugrožava tu relacijsku narav.
magisterium.assessment_en: Warning about emotional attachment is justified because AI can only simulate, but not achieve an authentic human relationship.
magisterium.enrichment_en: While AI can help in connecting, it cannot replace the human heart which is the sole seat of authentic feelings and decisions. Authentic relationships are an integral part of a person's growth, while withdrawal into artificial worlds threatens that relational nature.
concerns_en: Risk of replacing real interpersonal relationships and relationships with God with interaction with lifeless technological images.

sections.subtitle_en: Rapid integration of robots and challenges of emotional bonding
sections.screenshot_description_en: Robots in the factory or on the street, symbolizing their rapid integration.
sections.content_en: Ben asks about the speed of integration of robots into everyday life. Matthew explains that robots are already present in BMW and Amazon factories, but that the challenge is to create intelligent, humanoid robots capable of moving in a human environment. He predicts that the complexity of robot production will be resolved in the next ten years, which will lead to mass delivery. Elon Musk even predicts billions of robots. Matthew expresses concern that people will emotionally attach themselves to these robots, which could lead to social tensions, such as the desire for 'marriage' with robots and the expectation that society accepts them as human spouses. He believes that society is not yet ready for such challenges, but that they are probably inevitable.

sections.subtitle: Autonomna vozila: Preferencija AI nad ljudskom interakcijom
sections.screenshot_description: Waymo autonomno vozilo na ulicama San Francisca.
sections.content: Otac Filip dijeli zanimljivo zapažanje iz San Francisca, gdje ljudi sve više preferiraju autonomna vozila, poput Waymo taksija, umjesto onih s ljudskim vozačima. Razlozi su višestruki: putnici se osjećaju opuštenije bez potrebe za interakcijom, ne moraju razgovarati niti slušati, a autonomna vozila se percipiraju kao statistički sigurnija. Matthew dodaje i praktičnu prednost – nema potrebe za napojnicama. Ova preferencija ukazuje na širi trend gdje ljudi biraju učinkovitost i smanjenu socijalnu obvezu koju nudi AI, čak i u uslugama koje su tradicionalno uključivale ljudsku interakciju.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno uočava trend povlačenja iz međuljudskih odnosa u korist tehnološke ugode, što Crkva prepoznaje kao rizik za autentično ljudsko bratstvo.
concerns: Pretjerano oslanjanje na tehnologiju radi izbjegavanja interakcije može dovesti do slabljenja društvenih veza koje su temelj zajedničkog dobra.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava važnost 'susreta licem u lice' i fizičke prisutnosti koja nas izaziva i obogaćuje, upozoravajući da se međuljudski odnosi ne smiju svesti na sustave koji se gase na naredbu. Tehnologija mora služiti osobi i promicanju pravednijeg društvenog reda, a ne izolaciji pojedinca.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly observes a trend of withdrawal from interpersonal relationships in favor of technological comfort, which the Church recognizes as a risk to authentic human brotherhood.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes the importance of 'face-to-face encounters' and physical presence which challenges and enriches us, warning that interpersonal relationships must not be reduced to systems that shut down on command. Technology must serve the person and the promotion of a more just social order, and not the isolation of the individual.
concerns_en: Excessive reliance on technology for avoiding interaction can lead to the weakening of social ties which are the foundation of the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Autonomous vehicles: AI preference over human interaction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Waymo autonomous vehicle on the streets of San Francisco.
sections.content_en: Father Filip shares an interesting observation from San Francisco, where people increasingly prefer autonomous vehicles, such as Waymo taxis, instead of those with human drivers. The reasons are multiple: passengers feel more relaxed without the need for interaction, they do not have to talk or listen, and autonomous vehicles are perceived as statistically safer. Matthew also adds a practical advantage – there is no need for tips. This preference indicates a broader trend where people choose efficiency and reduced social obligation offered by AI, even in services that traditionally involved human interaction.

sections.subtitle: AI partneri i usamljenost: Harvardova studija potvrđuje nedostatak prave veze
sections.screenshot_description: Grafikon ili slika koja simbolizira usamljenost unatoč AI interakciji.
sections.content: Otac Filip ponovno se vraća na temu AI partnera, podsjećajući na svoju anegdotu sa studentima. Ističe da, iako se u početku čini da AI može ublažiti usamljenost, to nije dugoročno rješenje. Spominje studiju sa Sveučilišta Harvard, koju provodi Ron Ivey, koja empirijski dokazuje da emocionalno vezivanje za AI, unatoč postojanju platformi poput Character AI, ne liječi usamljenost. Ljudi s vremenom shvaćaju da je to jednosmjerna veza, bez prave ljudske prisutnosti s druge strane, što naglašava inherentnu razliku između ljudske i umjetne interakcije.

magisterium.assessment: Tvrdnja da AI partneri ne mogu izliječiti usamljenost u potpunosti je usklađena s katoličkom antropologijom koja čovjeka vidi kao biće stvoreno za zajedništvo s drugim osobama.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudska osoba je po svojoj naravi relacijsko biće stvoreno na sliku Božju, a istinska solidarnost i iscjeljenje usamljenosti proizlaze iz svjesnog izbora za uzajamnu brigu i pripadnost zajednici. AI se smatra alatom koji može pomoći u komunikaciji, ali ne smije zamijeniti ljudski život ili moralne prosudbe.
magisterium.assessment_en: The claim that AI partners cannot cure loneliness is fully aligned with Catholic anthropology which sees man as a being created for communion with other persons.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The human person is by its nature a relational being created in the image of God, and true solidarity and the healing of loneliness arise from a conscious choice for mutual care and belonging to a community. AI is considered a tool that can help in communication, but must not replace human life or moral judgments.

sections.subtitle_en: AI partners and loneliness: Harvard's study confirms the lack of true connection
sections.screenshot_description_en: Chart or picture which symbolizes loneliness despite AI interaction.
sections.content_en: Father Filip again returns to the topic of AI partners, recalling his anecdote with students. He points out that, although it initially seems that AI can alleviate loneliness, it is not a long-term solution. He mentions a study from Harvard University, conducted by Ron Ivey, which empirically proves that emotional attachment to AI, despite the existence of platforms like Character AI, does not cure loneliness. People eventually realize that it is a one-way relationship, without true human presence on the other side, which emphasizes the inherent difference between human and artificial interaction.

sections.subtitle: Kriza identiteta i rada: Crkva kao svjetionik u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Osoba koja razmišlja o smislu života i rada u kontekstu AI.
sections.content: Ben pita oca Filipa o ulozi Crkve u rješavanju problema usamljenosti i krize identiteta uzrokovane AI-jem. Otac Filip ističe da je ključno shvatiti da se svrha života ne smije isključivo vezati uz posao, jer će mnogi ljudi izgubiti tradicionalne poslove. Matthew se slaže, naglašavajući da je ideja o masovnom gubitku poslova egzistencijalno zastrašujuća, ali neizbježna. Predviđa da će 80-90% tradicionalnih poslova nestati, ostavljajući ljude s vremenom, ali bez jasnog smisla ako im je identitet vezan uz rad. Crkva, sa svojim učenjem o smislu života i ljudskom procvatu, ima ključnu ulogu u pružanju duhovnog vodstva i pomoći ljudima da pronađu svrhu izvan ekonomske korisnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Stav da se identitet ne smije vezati isključivo uz posao teološki je utemeljen na načelu da je 'rad za čovjeka, a ne čovjek za rad'.
concerns: Važno je ne zanemariti da je rad, unatoč promjenama, i dalje bitna dimenzija ljudskog rasta i sudjelovanja u Božjem stvaralačkom činu.
magisterium.enrichment: Iako rad nije jedini izvor smisla, on je put prema osobnom ispunjenju i služenju zajednici; stoga Crkva poziva na zaštitu dostojanstva radnika pred automatizacijom. Identitet osobe korijeni se u njezinom neotuđivom dostojanstvu kao slike Božje, što nadilazi njezinu ekonomsku funkciju.
magisterium.assessment_en: The view that identity must not be tied exclusively to work is theologically founded on the principle that 'work is for man, and not man for work'.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Although work is not the only source of meaning, it is a path towards personal fulfillment and service to the community; therefore the Church calls for the protection of the dignity of workers in the face of automation. The identity of a person is rooted in their inalienable dignity as an image of God, which transcends their economic function.
concerns_en: It is important not to neglect that work, despite changes, is still an essential dimension of human growth and participation in God's creative act.

sections.subtitle_en: Crisis of identity and work: The Church as a lighthouse in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Person who thinks about the meaning of life and work in the context of AI.
sections.content_en: Ben asks Father Filip about the role of the Church in solving the problem of loneliness and identity crisis caused by AI. Father Filip points out that it is crucial to understand that the purpose of life must not be exclusively tied to work, because many people will lose traditional jobs. Matthew agrees, emphasizing that the idea of mass job loss is existentially frightening, but inevitable. He predicts that 80-90% of traditional jobs will disappear, leaving people with time, but without clear meaning if their identity is tied to work. The Church, with its teaching on the meaning of life and human flourishing, has a crucial role in providing spiritual guidance and helping people find purpose beyond economic utility.

sections.subtitle: Brzina promjena i potreba za zajednicom: Deset godina kao generacija
sections.screenshot_description: Prikaz ljudi koji se okupljaju u zajednicama, simbolizirajući podršku.
sections.content: Matthew upozorava da će prilagodba na promjene koje donosi AI biti izuzetno brza, ne produženi prijelaz. Smatra da će AI 'pojesti' većinu poslova s bijelim ovratnicima, dok će poslovi s plavim ovratnicima, poput električara i vodoinstalatera, biti sigurni samo privremeno. Otac Filip naglašava da je u kontekstu AI 'deset godina generacija', pa čak i pet. Ubrzani tempo promjena bit će 'devastirajući', ali će potaknuti ljude na formiranje novih zajednica i grupa podrške, sličnih Anonimnim alkoholičarima ili biblijskim studijima, kako bi se nosili s gubitkom posla i pronašli novi smisao. Matthew dodaje da te grupe moraju imati viziju nade, a ne samo biti 'sesije bijesa'.

magisterium.assessment: Naglašavanje potrebe za zajednicom i grupama podrške izravno promiče katoličko načelo solidarnosti kao odgovor na društvene i ekonomske poremećaje uzrokovane AI-jem.
magisterium.enrichment: Solidarnost zahtijeva čvrstu odlučnost u težnji za općim dobrom, pretvarajući tehnološke veze u putove suradnje i uzajamne skrbi. U doba velikih transformacija rada, Crkva potiče nove oblike udruživanja i suradnje kako bi se spriječila marginalizacija i osigurala socijalna održivost.
magisterium.assessment_en: Emphasizing the need for community and support groups directly promotes the Catholic principle of solidarity as a response to social and economic disruptions caused by AI.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Solidarity requires firm determination in the pursuit of the common good, transforming technological connections into paths of cooperation and mutual care. In an era of great transformations of work, the Church encourages new forms of association and cooperation to prevent marginalization and ensure social sustainability.

sections.subtitle_en: Speed of changes and the need for community: Ten years as a generation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Display of people gathering in communities, symbolizing support.
sections.content_en: Matthew warns that the adaptation to changes brought by AI will be extremely fast, not a prolonged transition. He believes that AI will 'eat up' most white-collar jobs, while blue-collar jobs, such as electricians and plumbers, will be safe only temporarily. Father Filip emphasizes that in the context of AI, 'ten years is a generation', and even five. The accelerated pace of change will be 'devastating', but it will encourage people to form new communities and support groups, similar to Alcoholics Anonymous or Bible studies, to cope with job loss and find new meaning. Matthew adds that these groups must have a vision of hope, and not just be 'rage sessions'.

sections.subtitle: Vizija budućnosti i odgovornost vođa: AI usmjerena na čovjeka
sections.screenshot_description: Lideri raspravljaju o etičkim smjernicama za razvoj AI.
sections.content: Matthew ističe da je ključno da politički i duhovni vođe artikuliraju jasnu, optimističnu viziju budućnosti kako bi se spriječio bijes i očaj među onima koji će izgubiti posao. Smatra da sekularne vlade same neće moći učinkovito upravljati ovim prijelazom. Papa i drugi duhovni vođe imaju važnu ulogu u definiranju 'ljudskog procvata' i usmjeravanju razvoja AI prema problemima koji služe tom cilju, umjesto da se fokusiraju samo na tehničke inovacije ili ambiciozne projekte poput Marsa. Otac Filip dodaje da mnogi tehnološki lideri u Silicijskoj dolini ne žele preuzeti odgovornost izvan razvoja proizvoda, ali da neki prepoznaju potrebu za 'AI usmjerenom na čovjeka', poput inicijative Feifei Li sa Stanforda. Matthew zaključuje da je potrebna šira javna rasprava o tome kako želimo da se tehnologija razvija, a ne samo da budemo 'zapanjeni' njezinim napretkom.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak izvrsno odražava ulogu Crkve u definiranju ljudskog procvata i usmjeravanju tehnologije prema općem dobru.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva naglašava da tehnološki napredak mora služiti integralnom razvoju osobe, uključujući intelektualnu i duhovnu dobrobit. Politički vođe imaju moralnu odgovornost promicati dostojanstvo svake osobe i osigurati da AI služi zajedničkom dobru, a ne samo akumulaciji moći.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage excellently reflects the role of the Church in defining human flourishing and directing technology towards the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church emphasizes that technological progress must serve integral human development, including intellectual and spiritual well-being. Political leaders have a moral responsibility to promote the dignity of every person and to ensure that AI serves the common good, and not just the accumulation of power.

sections.subtitle_en: Vision of the future and responsibility of leaders: Human-centered AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Leaders discuss ethical guidelines for AI development.
sections.content_en: Matthew emphasizes that it is crucial for political and spiritual leaders to articulate a clear, optimistic vision of the future to prevent anger and despair among those who will lose their jobs. He believes that secular governments alone will not be able to effectively manage this transition. The Pope and other spiritual leaders have an important role in defining 'human flourishing' and directing AI development towards problems that serve that goal, instead of focusing only on technical innovations or ambitious projects like Mars. Father Filip adds that many technology leaders in Silicon Valley do not want to take responsibility beyond product development, but that some recognize the need for 'human-centered AI', such as Feifei Li's initiative from Stanford. Matthew concludes that a broader public discussion is needed about how we want technology to develop, and not just to be 'amazed' by its progress.

iterations.theme_en: AI in everyday life, future of work and social implications

iterations.theme: Uloga Crkve i društva u oblikovanju budućnosti AI i suočavanje s egzistencijalnim izazovima

sections.subtitle: Papa Leo XIV i očekivanja od enciklike o umjetnoj inteligenciji
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj Ben postavlja pitanje o glasinama o enciklici Pape Lea XIV o umjetnoj inteligenciji.
sections.content: Voditelj Ben započinje razgovor o glasinama da Papa Leo XIV radi na enciklici posvećenoj umjetnoj inteligenciji. Ističe kako je Crkva kroz povijest svjedočila brojnim tehnološkim i društvenim promjenama, te se pita kakav bi bio optimalan odgovor Pape i Crkve na izazove koje donosi AI. Ben podsjeća na kritike koje je Crkva dobivala u prošlosti zbog navodne sporosti u reagiranju na nove fenomene, ali primjećuje da se Papa Leo XIV čini energičnim i predanim rješavanju važnih tema. Otac Filip, odgovarajući na pitanje, pojašnjava da Papa Leo XIV već ima iza sebe najmanje pet važnih govora i rasprava o umjetnoj inteligenciji. Naglašava da je u tim govorima vidljiv Papin autentičan glas i osobni angažman, što sugerira da će i enciklika biti duboko promišljena i originalna.

magisterium.assessment: Sadržaj točno identificira povijesnu ulogu Crkve u praćenju tehnoloških promjena i potvrđuje postojanje nove enciklike Pape Lava XIV.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Lav XIV je 2026. godine objavio encikliku 'Magnifica Humanitas' kojom, poput Lava XIII., tumači 'nove stvari' našeg doba u svjetlu Evanđelja. Crkva kroz povijest, od industrijske revolucije do danas, kontinuirano razvija svoj socijalni nauk kako bi odgovorila na suvremene izazove.
magisterium.assessment_en: The content accurately identifies the historical role of the Church in monitoring technological changes and confirms the existence of a new encyclical of Pope Leo XIV.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Leo XIV in 2026 published the encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' with which, like Leo XIII, he interprets 'new things' of our time in the light of the Gospel. The Church throughout history, from the industrial revolution until today, continuously develops its social teaching to respond to contemporary challenges.

sections.subtitle_en: Pope Leo XIV and expectations from the encyclical on artificial intelligence
sections.screenshot_description_en: Host Ben asks a question about rumors about the encyclical of Pope Leo XIV about artificial intelligence.
sections.content_en: Host Ben begins the conversation about rumors that Pope Leo XIV is working on an encyclical dedicated to artificial intelligence. He points out how the Church throughout history has witnessed numerous technological and social changes, and he wonders what would be the optimal response of the Pope and the Church to the challenges brought by AI. Ben recalls the criticisms the Church received in the past due to alleged slowness in reacting to new phenomena, but he notes that Pope Leo XIV seems energetic and dedicated to addressing important topics. Father Filip, answering the question, explains that Pope Leo XIV already has at least five important speeches and discussions on artificial intelligence behind him. He emphasizes that in these speeches, the Pope's authentic voice and personal engagement are visible, which suggests that the encyclical will also be deeply thought out and original.

sections.subtitle: Ljudsko dostojanstvo naspram 'bezdušnih strojeva'
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip objašnjava Papin naglasak na ljudskom dostojanstvu i razlici između ljudi i strojeva.
sections.content: Otac Filip detaljnije objašnjava ključne naglaske Pape Lea XIV u kontekstu umjetne inteligencije. Papa dosljedno ističe **dostojanstvo ljudske osobe**, naglašavajući fundamentalnu razliku između ljudske i umjetne inteligencije. Također, važan je aspekt poštovanja radne snage i izbjegavanja masovnih otpuštanja zbog automatizacije. Otac Filip posebno izdvaja Papinu izjavu od 21. lipnja, upućenu međuparlamentarnim članovima Vatikana, gdje je naglasio da ljudi trebaju druge ljude za autentične odnose, a ne 'bezdušnu mašinu'. Ova fraza, 'bezdušna mašina', ključna je jer strojevi, za razliku od ljudi, nemaju dušu. Otac Filip ističe da je ova jasna distinkcija, utemeljena na kršćanskoj antropologiji, iznimno važna u raspravi o AI, jer duša posreduje kroz tijelo, pamćenje i emocije, što strojevi ne mogu replicirati.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je potpuno usklađen s naukom o jedinstvenom dostojanstvu čovjeka i nužnosti zaštite radnika pred automatizacijom.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudska osoba posjeduje dostojanstvo slike Božje koje nijedan stroj ne može zamijeniti, jer strojevi nemaju srce ni sposobnost za autentičnu ljubav. Papa upozorava da se čovjek ne smije svesti na puku produktivnost ili podatke, te da odluke o radu moraju ostati u ljudskim rukama.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with the teaching about the unique dignity of man and the necessity of protecting workers before automation.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The human person possesses the dignity of the image of God which no machine can replace, because machines do not have a heart nor the capacity for authentic love. The Pope warns that man must not be reduced to mere productivity or data, and that decisions about work must remain in human hands.

sections.subtitle_en: Human dignity versus 'soulless machines'
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip explains the Pope's emphasis on human dignity and the difference between people and machines.
sections.content_en: Father Filip explains in more detail the key highlights of Pope Leo XIV in the context of artificial intelligence. The Pope consistently emphasizes the **dignity of the human person**, highlighting the fundamental difference between human and artificial intelligence. Also, an important aspect is the respect for the workforce and avoiding mass layoffs due to automation. Father Filip particularly singles out the Pope's statement from June 21, addressed to the inter-parliamentary members of the Vatican, where he emphasized that people need other people for authentic relationships, and not a 'soulless machine'. This phrase, 'soulless machine', is key because machines, unlike people, do not have a soul. Father Filip points out that this clear distinction, based on Christian anthropology, is extremely important in the discussion about AI, because the soul mediates through the body, memory, and emotions, which machines cannot replicate.

sections.subtitle: Iščekivanje nove Papine enciklike: Više od ponavljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip govori o tome zašto nova enciklika neće biti 'Rerum Novarum 2'.
sections.content: Otac Filip izražava uvjerenje da nova enciklika Pape Lea XIV neće biti tek 'Rerum Novarum 2', odnosno puko ponavljanje ranijih socijalnih doktrina Crkve. Iako su principi društvene doktrine nepromjenjivi, Papa će, kako kaže Otac Filip, 'učiniti za naše doba ono što je Papa Leo XIII učinio za svoje doba' – ponuditi nešto novo i bogato, prilagođeno suvremenim izazovima. Spominje i postojeći dokument iz Vatikana od 28. siječnja, iz Dikasterija za obrazovanje i kulturu te Dikasterija za nauk vjere, kao dobru smjernicu i sintezu katoličkog gledišta na AI. Međutim, očekuje da će nova enciklika donijeti snažne i inovativne perspektive koje će biti od velike važnosti za budućnost.

magisterium.assessment: Ispravno se ističe kontinuitet nepromjenjivih principa uz inovativnu primjenu na nove izazove umjetne inteligencije.
magisterium.enrichment: Socijalni nauk Crkve nije statičan skup koncepata, već živi korpus istine koji se nadograđuje na temelje poput 'Rerum Novarum'. Nova enciklika 'Magnifica Humanitas' predstavlja paradigmatski pomak u tretiranju AI, pozivajući na njezino 'razoružanje' od logika dominacije.
magisterium.assessment_en: The continuity of immutable principles is rightly emphasized, along with innovative application to new challenges of artificial intelligence.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The social teaching of the Church is not a static set of concepts, but a living body of truth that builds upon foundations like 'Rerum Novarum'. The new encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' represents a paradigmatic shift in treating AI, calling for its 'disarmament' from logics of domination.

sections.subtitle_en: Anticipation of the new Papal encyclical: More than repetition
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip speaks about why the new encyclical will not be 'Rerum Novarum 2'.
sections.content_en: Otac Filip expresses conviction that the new encyclical of Pope Leo XIV will not be merely 'Rerum Novarum 2', that is, a mere repetition of earlier social doctrines of the Church. Although the principles of social doctrine are unchangeable, the Pope will, as Otac Filip says, 'do for our age what Pope Leo XIII did for his age' – offer something new and rich, adapted to contemporary challenges. He also mentions an existing document from the Vatican from January 28, from the Dicastery for Education and Culture and the Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith, as a good guideline and synthesis of the Catholic view on AI. However, he expects that the new encyclical will bring strong and innovative perspectives that will be of great importance for the future.
entities_en: Dicastery for the Doctrine of the Faith

sections.subtitle: Crkva kao moralni kompas za ljudsko cvjetanje u doba AI
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew objašnjava ulogu Crkve u definiranju ljudskog cvjetanja u kontekstu AI.
sections.content: Matthew se nadovezuje na raspravu, ističući da, iako ne želi pretpostavljati Papine riječi, očekuje da će enciklika naglasiti ključnu ulogu ljudi, važnost rada i potrebu da se tehnologije usmjere prema **ljudskom cvjetanju**. Matthew smatra da Crkva, s obzirom na svoje tisućljetno iskustvo u proučavanju ljudskog stanja, ima jedinstvenu poziciju da definira što to 'ljudsko cvjetanje' uistinu jest. Izražava nadu da će Papa i njegovi savjetnici jasno postaviti etičke granice za razvoj i primjenu umjetne inteligencije, razlučujući što je zdravo i korisno za čovječanstvo, a što bi moglo ometati ljudski prosperitet. Ova uloga Crkve kao moralnog kompasa postaje sve važnija u svijetu gdje mnogi, uključujući transhumaniste, imaju različite vizije budućnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je u potpunosti usklađen s naukom jer naglašava primat čovjeka nad tehnologijom i ulogu Crkve u definiranju ljudskog dostojanstva.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva uči da je ljudska osoba krajnji cilj društva kojemu je ono podređeno. Tehnologija se mora usmjeravati prema općem dobru i promicanju dostojanstva svake osobe.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with the teaching because it emphasizes the primacy of man over technology and the role of the Church in defining human dignity.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church teaches that the human person is the ultimate goal of society, to which it is subordinate. Technology must be directed towards the common good and the promotion of the dignity of every person.

sections.subtitle_en: Church as a moral compass for human flourishing in the age of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew explains the role of the Church in defining human flourishing in the context of AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew builds on the discussion, pointing out that, although he does not want to presume the Pope's words, he expects that the encyclical will emphasize the key role of people, the importance of work, and the need for technologies to be directed towards **human flourishing**. Matthew believes that the Church, given its millennial experience in studying the human condition, has a unique position to define what 'human flourishing' truly is. He expresses hope that the Pope and his advisors will clearly set ethical boundaries for the development and application of artificial intelligence, discerning what is healthy and beneficial for humanity, and what could hinder human prosperity. This role of the Church as a moral compass is becoming increasingly important in a world where many, including transhumanists, have different visions of the future.

sections.subtitle: Postavljanje granica: Brak s robotima i opasnosti lažnih veza
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew koristi primjer braka s robotima kako bi ilustrirao potrebu za jasnim etičkim granicama.
sections.content: Matthew nastavlja s provokativnim primjerom kako bi ilustrirao potrebu za jasnim etičkim smjernicama. Pita se hoće li Crkva jasno reći da 'brak s robotom' nije dobar za ljudsko cvjetanje. Smatra da bi Crkva trebala postaviti granice za ono što je očito štetno za ljudske odnose i društvo, poput formiranja dubokih emocionalnih veza s umjetnom inteligencijom ili robotima umjesto s drugim ljudima. Matthew naglašava da su takve stvari, iako 'očite' za katolike, možda nisu toliko jasne za mnoge druge, posebno za transhumaniste koji aktivno istražuju takve mogućnosti. Upozorava da bi se, bez jasnih smjernica, društvo moglo suočiti s napetostima i nezdravim dinamikama u odnosima između ljudi i strojeva, gdje bi se od robota očekivalo da budu tretirani kao ljudski supružnici.

magisterium.assessment: Stav je savršeno usklađen s katoličkom doktrinom koja brak definira isključivo kao zajednicu muškarca i žene otvorenu životu.
magisterium.enrichment: Brak je po svojoj naravi neraskidiva zajednica muškarca i žene utemeljena od Stvoritelja. Svaki pokušaj priznavanja nečega što nije brak kao braka narušava njegovu sakramentalnu i antropološku bit.
magisterium.assessment_en: The position is perfectly aligned with Catholic doctrine which defines marriage exclusively as a union of man and woman open to life.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Marriage is by its nature an indissoluble community of man and woman established by the Creator. Every attempt to recognize something that is not marriage as marriage violates its sacramental and anthropological essence.

sections.subtitle_en: Setting boundaries: Marriage with robots and the dangers of false relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew uses the example of marriage with robots to illustrate the need for clear ethical boundaries.
sections.content_en: Matthew continues with a provocative example to illustrate the need for clear ethical guidelines. He asks if the Church will clearly state that 'marriage with a robot' is not good for human flourishing. He believes that the Church should set boundaries for what is obviously harmful to human relationships and society, such as forming deep emotional bonds with artificial intelligence or robots instead of with other people. Matthew emphasizes that such things, although 'obvious' for Catholics, may not be so clear for many others, especially for transhumanists who are actively exploring such possibilities. He warns that, without clear guidelines, society could face tensions and unhealthy dynamics in relationships between people and machines, where robots would be expected to be treated as human spouses.

sections.subtitle: Utjecaj ekrana na mlade i erozija kritičkog razmišljanja
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip govori o inicijativi u Massachusettsu za zabranu telefona u školama i studiji MIT-a o AI i kritičkom razmišljanju.
sections.content: Otac Filip skreće pozornost na konkretne društvene izazove, navodeći inicijativu guvernerice Massachusettsa da se učenicima od vrtića do osmog razreda zabrani nošenje telefona u školu. Ova mjera, podržana od strane ravnatelja škola, proizlazi iz zabrinutosti da djeca ne uče, već se igraju na mobitelima. Iako se radi o složenom pitanju s iznimkama za određene potrebe, trend je jasan: prekomjerno vrijeme provedeno pred ekranom ima negativne psihološke učinke na mlade, uključujući porast depresije i stope samoubojstava. Otac Filip spominje i studiju MIT-a koja sugerira da prekomjerno korištenje alata poput ChatGPT-a smanjuje sposobnost kritičkog razmišljanja. Zaključuje da se ne radi o zabrani tehnologije, već o potrebi za 'neinteligentnim korištenjem' koje šteti razvoju mladih.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak odražava suvremenu pastoralnu zabrinutost Crkve zbog negativnog utjecaja digitalnih uređaja na razvoj mladih.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Leo XIV. upozorava da pretjerana izloženost ekranima bez nadzora šteti pažnji, emocionalnoj kontroli i odnosima mladih. Potrebno je zaštititi unutarnji život djece od tehnoloških utjecaja koji ometaju njihov put prema zrelosti.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage reflects the contemporary pastoral concern of the Church due to the negative influence of digital devices on the development of young people.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Leo XIV. warns that excessive exposure to screens without supervision harms the attention, emotional control, and relationships of young people. It is necessary to protect the inner life of children from technological influences which hinder their path towards maturity.

sections.subtitle_en: Impact of screens on youth and the erosion of critical thinking
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip speaks about the initiative in Massachusetts for banning phones in schools and the MIT study on AI and critical thinking.
sections.content_en: Father Filip draws attention to concrete social challenges, citing the initiative of the Massachusetts governor to ban students from kindergarten to eighth grade from carrying phones to school. This measure, supported by school principals, stems from the concern that children are not learning, but rather playing on their mobile phones. Although it is a complex issue with exceptions for certain needs, the trend is clear: excessive screen time has negative psychological effects on young people, including an increase in depression and suicide rates. Father Filip also mentions an MIT study which suggests that excessive use of tools like ChatGPT reduces critical thinking ability. He concludes that it is not about banning technology, but about the need for 'unintelligent use' which harms the development of young people.

sections.subtitle: Spoznaja studenata: Inteligentno korištenje AI za postizanje ciljeva
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip dijeli iskustvo svojih studenata o korištenju ChatGPT-a i važnosti svrhe.
sections.content: Otac Filip dijeli zanimljivo iskustvo sa svojim studentima poslijediplomskog studija. Na početku semestra im je rekao da ne želi radove napisane uz pomoć ChatGPT-a. Studenti su mu kasnije priznali da su kao brucoši često koristili ChatGPT za zadaće, ali su s vremenom shvatili da 'nisu ništa naučili'. Ova spoznaja, do koje su došli sami, bez vanjskog pritiska, naglašava važnost **inteligentnog korištenja AI**. Otac Filip ističe da je ključno znati svoj cilj i koristiti AI kao alat za njegovo postizanje, a ne kao zamjenu za učenje i razvoj. Njegov moto na sveučilištu je: 'Pronađimo inteligentan način korištenja umjetne inteligencije', što se odražava i u projektima poput Matthewovog Magisterium AI, koji predstavlja primjer svrhovite primjene AI.

magisterium.assessment: Naglašavanje formativnog korištenja AI-ja koje ne zamjenjuje osobni razvoj izravno podržava crkveni poziv na mudrost srca.
magisterium.enrichment: Pristup podacima ne smije se miješati sa sposobnošću pronalaženja smisla i istine, što zahtijeva ljudsku inteligenciju. Umjetna inteligencija treba služiti kao alat koji potiče, a ne guši ljudsku kreativnost i duhovni rast.
magisterium.assessment_en: Emphasizing the formative use of AI which does not replace personal development directly supports the Church's call to wisdom of the heart.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Access to data must not be confused with the ability to find meaning and truth, which requires human intelligence. Artificial intelligence should serve as a tool that encourages, and not stifles, human creativity and spiritual growth.

sections.subtitle_en: Students' insight: Intelligent use of AI for achieving goals
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip shares the experience of his students about using ChatGPT and the importance of purpose.
sections.content_en: Father Filip shares an interesting experience with his postgraduate students. At the beginning of the semester, he told them that he does not want papers written with the help of ChatGPT. The students later admitted to him that as freshmen they often used ChatGPT for assignments, but over time they realized that 'they learned nothing'. This realization, which they reached themselves, without external pressure, emphasizes the importance of **intelligent use of AI**. Father Filip points out that it is crucial to know one's goal and to use AI as a tool for achieving it, and not as a substitute for learning and development. His motto at the university is: 'Let's find an intelligent way to use artificial intelligence', which is also reflected in projects like Matthew's Magisterium AI, which represents an example of purposeful application of AI.

sections.subtitle: Nedostatak formacije i opasnost od lažnih odnosa
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew izražava zabrinutost zbog ljudi bez duhovne i filozofske formacije koji su podložni ovisnostima o tehnologiji.
sections.content: Matthew izražava duboku zabrinutost za one koji nemaju koristi od 'formacije' – bilo katoličke teološke, filozofske ili duhovne. Smatra da je takvim osobama teže prepoznati i izbjeći zamke tehnologije, poput ovisnosti o igricama ili umjetnoj inteligenciji. Ističe da mnogi ljudi, odrasli u 'razbijenim domovima' ili izloženi nezdravim modelima odnosa u medijima, nemaju jasan osjećaj za to što su ispunjavajući ljudski odnosi. U takvom kontekstu, lako se okreću jeftinim zamjenama koje nude tehnologija i AI, tražeći trenutne dopaminske udarce i površne veze. Matthew upozorava da bez razumijevanja vlastitih darova i svrhe, ljudi lako padaju u zamku besciljnog trošenja vremena, što ih čini ranjivima na ovisnosti i egzistencijalnu prazninu.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je u potpunosti usklađen s katoličkim naukom o potrebi formacije savjesti i opasnostima medijskih utjecaja na ljudske odnose.
magisterium.enrichment: Katekizam naglašava da korisnici medija moraju formirati prosvijetljenu i ispravnu savjest kako bi se oduprli nezdravim utjecajima. Obitelj je primarno mjesto učenja moralnih vrijednosti, stoga njezino slabljenje izravno šteti sposobnosti prepoznavanja istinskih odnosa.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with Catholic teaching about the need for the formation of conscience and the dangers of media influences on human relationships.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Catechism emphasizes that media users must form an enlightened and correct conscience in order to resist unhealthy influences. Family is the primary place for learning moral values, therefore its weakening directly harms the ability to recognize true relationships.

sections.subtitle_en: Lack of formation and danger of false relationships
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew expresses concern about people without spiritual and philosophical formation who are susceptible to technology addictions.
sections.content_en: Matthew expresses deep concern for those who do not benefit from 'formation' – whether Catholic theological, philosophical, or spiritual. He believes that it is harder for such individuals to recognize and avoid the traps of technology, such as addiction to video games or artificial intelligence. He points out that many people, raised in 'broken homes' or exposed to unhealthy relationship models in the media, do not have a clear sense of what fulfilling human relationships are. In such a context, they easily turn to cheap substitutes offered by technology and AI, seeking instant dopamine hits and superficial connections. Matthew warns that without understanding their own gifts and purpose, people easily fall into the trap of aimless time-wasting, which makes them vulnerable to addictions and existential emptiness.

sections.subtitle: Egzistencijalna litica: Potraga za svrhom u svijetu ovisnosti
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew opisuje koncept 'egzistencijalne litice' i opasnosti nedostatka svrhe.
sections.content: Matthew uvodi koncept 'egzistencijalne litice', opisujući stanje u kojem ljudi, lišeni istinske svrhe i zadovoljstva, padaju u beskrajni ciklus distrakcija. Bilo da se radi o igranju videoigara, pornografiji ili drugim oblicima bijega, te aktivnosti pružaju samo privremeno zadovoljstvo, ali ne ispunjavaju duboke ljudske potrebe. Na kraju, ljudi dosegnu 'vrh svijeta igara' ili bilo koje druge ovisnosti i shvate da to nije zadovoljavajuće. Tada se suočavaju s prazninom i nedostatkom smisla, što Matthew naziva 'egzistencijalnom liticom'. Upozorava da bez snažne evangelizacijske misije Crkve, koja bi ljudima pružila nadu i svrhu, mnogi će se 'izgubiti' i 'skočiti s litice', jer ne vide drugi put. Matthew naglašava da je to problem koji bi trebao zabrinjavati sve.

magisterium.assessment: Sadržaj izvrsno odražava kršćansku antropologiju o čovjekovoj potrazi za smislom koji se ne može naći u prolaznim užicima.
magisterium.enrichment: Čovjek je stvoren od Boga i za Boga, te će samo u Njemu pronaći istinu i sreću za kojom neprestano traga. Tehnologija i znanost same po sebi ne mogu otkriti smisao postojanja, već on dolazi kroz objavu Boga.
magisterium.assessment_en: The content excellently reflects Christian anthropology about man's search for meaning which cannot be found in fleeting pleasures.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Man is created by God and for God, and will only in Him find truth and happiness for which he constantly searches. Technology and science by themselves cannot discover the meaning of existence, but it comes through the revelation of God.

sections.subtitle_en: Existential cliff: Search for purpose in the world of addiction
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew describes the concept of 'existential cliff' and the dangers of lack of purpose.
sections.content_en: Matthew introduces the concept of 'existential cliff', describing a state in which people, deprived of true purpose and satisfaction, fall into an endless cycle of distractions. Whether it is about playing video games, pornography, or other forms of escape, these activities provide only temporary satisfaction, but do not fulfill deep human needs. In the end, people reach 'the top of the gaming world' or any other addiction and realize that it is not satisfying. Then they face emptiness and lack of meaning, which Matthew calls 'the existential cliff'. He warns that without a strong evangelization mission of the Church, which would provide people with hope and purpose, many will 'get lost' and 'jump off the cliff', because they do not see another way. Matthew emphasizes that this is a problem that should concern everyone.

sections.subtitle: Japan kao upozorenje: Demografska kriza i socijalna izolacija
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew govori o demografskim problemima Japana kao upozorenju za globalno društvo.
sections.content: Matthew ističe demografske probleme Japana kao 'kanarinca u rudniku ugljena' za globalno društvo. Analizirajući stope nataliteta, brakova i opću vitalnost društva, primjećuje da se u Japanu te statistike drastično smanjuju. Za razliku od Kine, gdje je politika jednog djeteta imala jasan utjecaj, u Japanu je problem dublji: mladi su toliko socijalno izolirani i nespretni da im trebaju programi kako bi naučili kako se družiti. Matthew upozorava da se slični trendovi sve više pojavljuju i drugdje u svijetu. Ako se ne poduzmu koraci za sprječavanje ove socijalne i demografske krize, društva će se brzo kretati prema 'bezdanu' gdje će ljudi biti previše samosvjesni i nesposobni za stvaranje dubokih veza, što će imati katastrofalne posljedice za brak, obitelj i budućnost čovječanstva. Elon Musk također često koristi svoju platformu za upozoravanje na ove probleme, iako Matthew smatra da mu nedostaje konkretno rješenje, koje on vidi u katoličkoj vjeri.

magisterium.assessment: Analiza demografske krize i izolacije mladih sukladna je crkvenom nauku o važnosti obitelji i društvene naravi čovjeka.
magisterium.enrichment: Ljudska osoba po svojoj naravi treba društveni život za razvoj svojih potencijala, a obitelj je temeljna stanica društva čije zanemarivanje donosi veliku štetu zajednici. Brak i obitelj su usmjereni prokreaciji i odgoju djece, ključnom za vitalnost svakog društva.
magisterium.assessment_en: The analysis of the demographic crisis and the isolation of young people is consistent with Church teaching about the importance of family and the social nature of man.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The human person by its nature needs social life for the development of its potentials, and the family is the fundamental cell of society whose neglect brings great harm to the community. Marriage and family are directed to procreation and the upbringing of children, crucial for the vitality of every society.

sections.subtitle_en: Japan as a warning: Demographic crisis and social isolation
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew speaks about the demographic problems of Japan as a warning for global society.
sections.content_en: Matthew highlights Japan's demographic problems as 'a canary in a coal mine' for global society. Analyzing birth rates, marriage rates, and the general vitality of society, he notes that in Japan these statistics are drastically decreasing. Unlike China, where the one-child policy had a clear impact, in Japan the problem is deeper: young people are so socially isolated and awkward that they need programs to learn how to socialize. Matthew warns that similar trends are increasingly appearing elsewhere in the world. If steps are not taken to prevent this social and demographic crisis, societies will rapidly move towards an 'abyss' where people will be too self-conscious and incapable of forming deep connections, which will have catastrophic consequences for marriage, family, and the future of humanity. Elon Musk also often uses his platform to warn about these problems, although Matthew believes he lacks a concrete solution, which he sees in the Catholic faith.

sections.subtitle: Predviđanje budućnosti kroz analizu ponašanja i ljudske prirode
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip objašnjava kako se Matthewovi uvidi temelje na analizi obrazaca ponašanja.
sections.content: Otac Filip objašnjava da Matthewovi uvidi o budućnosti proizlaze iz analize obrazaca ponašanja i ekstrapolacije trendova, slično radu psihologa i ekonomista. Naglašava da ekonomija, za razliku od fizike, nije 'čista znanost' jer uključuje ljudski faktor, koji je često nepredvidiv. Spominje Miltona Friedmana i njegovu sklonost predviđanjima koja se ne ostvaruju jer ne uzimaju u obzir sve složene čimbenike ljudskog ponašanja. Otac Filip navodi primjer gdje ljudi često biraju skuplji proizvod, iako je identičan jeftinijem, što pokazuje iracionalnost ljudske prirode. Zaključuje da je razumijevanje ljudske prirode ključno za predviđanje budućnosti, a Matthewova sposobnost da prepozna te obrasce omogućuje mu da sagleda potencijalne izazove koji nas čekaju u sljedećih pet do deset godina.

magisterium.assessment: Tvrdnja o nepredvidivosti ljudskog faktora u ekonomiji i njezinoj povezanosti s ljudskom prirodom u skladu je sa socijalnim naukom Crkve.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva uči da ekonomski i moralni poredak nisu odvojeni, jer razum pokazuje svrhu koju je Bog odredio za ekonomski život. Ekonomija koja ne služi dobru cjelovite osobe gubi svoj pravi identitet, jer je ljudska osoba subjekt i cilj svih društvenih institucija.
magisterium.assessment_en: The assertion about the unpredictability of the human factor in the economy and its connection with human nature is in accordance with the social teaching of the Church.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church teaches that the economic and moral order are not separate, because reason shows the purpose which God has determined for economic life. An economy that does not serve the good of the whole person loses its true identity, because the human person is the subject and goal of all social institutions.

sections.subtitle_en: Prediction of the future through analysis of behavior and human nature
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip explains how Matthew's insights are based on the analysis of patterns of behavior.
sections.content_en: Father Filip explains that Matthew's insights about the future stem from the analysis of behavioral patterns and trend extrapolation, similar to the work of psychologists and economists. He emphasizes that economics, unlike physics, is not a 'pure science' because it includes the human factor, which is often unpredictable. He mentions Milton Friedman and his tendency for predictions that do not come true because they do not take into account all complex factors of human behavior. Father Filip cites an example where people often choose a more expensive product, even though it is identical to a cheaper one, which shows the irrationality of human nature. He concludes that understanding human nature is crucial for predicting the future, and Matthew's ability to recognize these patterns allows him to foresee potential challenges that await us in the next five to ten years.

sections.subtitle: Jeffrey Hinton: 'Preuređujem sve' zbog straha od AI
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip prepričava anegdotu o Jeffreyu Hintonu i njegovoj reakciji na brzi razvoj AI.
sections.content: Otac Filip prepričava anegdotu o Jeffreyu Hintonu, jednom od pionira strojnog učenja i dobitniku Nobelove nagrade. Kada je Hinton primio vijest o nagradi, izjavio je da 'sada sve preuređuje' u svom životu – likvidira dugoročne investicije, otplaćuje hipoteku sinu. Ova zagonetna izjava, koju je Hinton objasnio kao pripremu za neizvjesnu budućnost, duboko je zabrinjavajuća. Otac Filip ističe da Hinton, kao i drugi ugledni stručnjaci poput Elona Muska, Billa Gatesa, Stevea Hawkinga i Aliasara Yukovskog, upozoravaju na disruptivni potencijal umjetne inteligencije. Njegova reakcija, 'ja se uređujem jer nemamo puno vremena', odražava duboku zabrinutost među onima koji najbolje razumiju tehnologiju, sugerirajući da se pripremaju za scenarij u kojem će se stvari drastično promijeniti, i to ne nužno na bolje.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak ispravno prepoznaje ambivalenciju tehnološkog napretka koja izaziva i oduševljenje i strah, što je u skladu s Papinim zapažanjima o AI.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Franjo ističe da AI izaziva strah zbog mogućih posljedica, ali podsjeća da je tehnologija dar Božji koji treba služiti općem dobru. Crkva naglašava da ljudsko dostojanstvo zahtijeva odgovorno upravljanje alatima koji utječu na društvene odnose.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage correctly recognizes the ambivalence of technological progress which causes both enthusiasm and fear, which is in line with the Pope's observations on AI.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Francis points out that AI causes fear due to possible consequences, but reminds that technology is God's gift which should serve the common good. The Church emphasizes that human dignity requires responsible management of tools that affect social relations.

sections.subtitle_en: Jeffrey Hinton: 'I am re-arranging everything' because of fear of AI
sections.screenshot_description_en: Father Filip recounts an anecdote about Jeffrey Hinton and his reaction to the rapid development of AI.
sections.content_en: Father Filip recounts an anecdote about Jeffrey Hinton, one of the pioneers of machine learning and a Nobel Prize winner. When Hinton received the news about the award, he stated that 'he is now rearranging everything' in his life – liquidating long-term investments, paying off his son's mortgage. This enigmatic statement, which Hinton explained as preparation for an uncertain future, is deeply concerning. Father Filip points out that Hinton, as well as other prominent experts like Elon Musk, Bill Gates, Steve Hawking, and Aliasar Yukovsky, warn about the disruptive potential of artificial intelligence. His reaction, 'I am rearranging myself because we don't have much time', reflects deep concern among those who best understand the technology, suggesting that they are preparing for a scenario in which things will drastically change, and not necessarily for the better.

sections.subtitle: Cinizam bogatih i potreba za nadom u budućnost
sections.screenshot_description: Matthew raspravlja o cinizmu bogatih i važnosti nade u suočavanju s izazovima AI.
sections.content: Matthew interpretira ponašanje Jeffreyja Hintona i drugih ultrabogatih pojedinaca (poput gradnje bunkera i likvidacije imovine) kao znak cinizma i nedostatka povjerenja u sposobnost društva da se nosi s nadolazećim promjenama. Smatra da takav stav, gdje najuspješniji ljudi 'odustaju' od nade u bolju budućnost, može biti izuzetno opasan i demoralizirajući za širu javnost. Matthew naglašava da je u takvom kontekstu ključno pronaći način da se 'nacrta nada na putu'. Iako priznaje da je situacija teška, vjeruje da ljudi i dalje imaju moć oblikovati budućnost. Stoga je, prema Matthewu, iznimno važno da Katolička Crkva aktivno sudjeluje u ovoj raspravi, nudeći nadu i oslanjajući se na evanđeoska načela i učenja svetaca kako bi se pronašla rješenja za probleme koji, iako se čine novima, često imaju korijene u vječnim ljudskim izazovima.

magisterium.assessment: Analiza cinizma i gubitka nade snažno rezonira s katoličkim naukom o kršćanskoj nadi kao sidru u vremenima nesigurnosti.
magisterium.enrichment: Kršćanska nada nije tek optimizam, već dar koji pokreće volju na dijeljenje i solidarnost, nasuprot 'bolesnoj ekonomiji' koja stvara nejednakosti. Papa Leo XIV podsjeća da se prava nada nalazi u Bogu, a ne u materijalnom bogatstvu koje treba relativizirati.
magisterium.assessment_en: The analysis of cynicism and loss of hope strongly resonates with Catholic teaching about Christian hope as an anchor in times of uncertainty.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Christian hope is not just optimism, but a gift that moves the will to sharing and solidarity, as opposed to a 'sick economy' that creates inequalities. Pope Leo XIV reminds that true hope is found in God, and not in material wealth which needs to be relativized.

sections.subtitle_en: Cynicism of the rich and the need for hope in the future
sections.screenshot_description_en: Matthew discusses the cynicism of the rich and the importance of hope in facing the challenges of AI.
sections.content_en: Matthew interprets the behavior of Jeffrey Hinton and other ultra-rich individuals (such as building bunkers and liquidating assets) as a sign of cynicism and a lack of trust in society's ability to cope with impending changes. He believes that such an attitude, where the most successful people 'give up' hope for a better future, can be extremely dangerous and demoralizing for the wider public. Matthew emphasizes that in such a context, it is crucial to find a way to 'draw hope on the path'. Although he admits that the situation is difficult, he believes that people still have the power to shape the future. Therefore, according to Matthew, it is extremely important for the Catholic Church to actively participate in this discussion, offering hope and relying on evangelical principles and the teachings of saints to find solutions for problems which, although they seem new, often have roots in eternal human challenges.

iterations.theme_en: Role of the Church and society in shaping the future of AI and facing existential challenges

iterations.theme: Filozofske i teološke perspektive transhumanizma, AI usklađivanja i smisla života

sections.subtitle: Yuval Harari i upozorenja o budućnosti tehnologije: Dedaizam i distopijske vizije
sections.screenshot_description: Otac Filip drži knjigu Yuvala Hararija 'Homo Deus' ili sličnu knjigu o budućnosti tehnologije.
sections.content: Otac Filip započinje raspravu osvrćući se na djelo Yuvala Hararija, posebno na njegovu knjigu **'Homo Deus'** i završno poglavlje 'Dedaizam', koje služi kao upozorenje o budućnosti tehnologije. Harari, poznati povjesničar iz Izraela, prema Ocu Filipu, ne veliča tehnologiju, već koristi provokativne izjave kako bi šokirao čitatelje i natjerao ih na razmišljanje o smjeru u kojem se društvo kreće. Primjerice, Hararijeva tvrdnja da je 'Google mnogo bolji od spoja' za pronalaženje partnera, služi kao alarm da algoritmi mogu ponuditi 'bolje' podudarnosti, ali po cijenu ljudske interakcije. Matthew se slaže da transhumanistička vizija budućnosti nije poželjna, uspoređujući je s distopijskim scenarijima iz videoigara poput **'Cyberpunk 2077'**, gdje se ljudi spajaju sa strojevima u neprestanoj potrazi za nadogradnjom i korisnošću, što predstavlja ozbiljnu prijetnju ljudskosti.

magisterium.assessment: Kritika dataizma kao redukcionističke ideologije koja razum svodi na rješavanje problema usklađena je s teološkom kritikom imanentizma.
